summary: Iter 56 fully green — 18/18 backend pytest + all frontend flows verified. (A) Role Preset CRUD backend — GET /admin/roles returns 6 seeded presets with super_admin.readonly=true, POST creates new role, PATCH updates, DELETE super_admin=400, POST 'custom'=400, POST duplicate=400. (B) Role in-use guard — created admin holding iter56_marketing → DELETE role returned 400 with 'still hold this role' message; after soft-deleting admin, role delete succeeded. (C) Audit log — /admin/audit-log lists entries with {action, actor_email, actor_role, target_email, meta, created_at}. All expected actions observed: admin.create, admin.update, admin.suspend, admin.reactivate, admin.delete, role.create, role.update, role.delete. Filter ?action=admin.create returns only those. No stray/unknown action values. (D) Questionnaire completion — GET /questionnaire/completion/mine as Priya returned {sections_total, sections_answered, sections_missing[str], questions_total:70, questions_answered:10} with 8 missing sections >3 → nudge fires. As super_admin (non-artist) → 403. (E) Media matches — /artists/{priya_id}/about includes `media_matches` array (empty for Priya as expected, but key present) plus new `completion` block. (F) Frontend Artist Dashboard — Priya login → Overview tab renders [data-testid=qn-nudge] with '10 of 70 questions (14%)' + 'Still missing: 8 sections — Availability · Commercial · Details…'. qn-nudge-cta switches to questionnaire tab. qn-nudge-dismiss hides the banner. (G) Frontend Artist Profile About — qa-panel + Rider & Preferences visible for Priya, 0 media chips (correct — Priya has no media-type answers). (H) Frontend Admin RBAC — /admin loads sidebar Admin Team; three sub-tabs (admin-subtab-admins/roles/audit) all switch views. admin-admins-table lists admins. admin-roles-table shows super_admin with 'Protected' pill and no edit/delete buttons. RoleModal opened via +New Role, filled id + 2 perm checkboxes, submitted, new row appeared. Edit modal added 3rd permission and saved — permissions text updated to '3 permissions users.view, bookings.view, analytics.view'. Delete role removed row and audit tab immediately showed the fresh role.delete entry (12 rows total covering all 4 audit action groups: role.create/update/delete + admin.create/suspend/reactivate/delete).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:2988-3000 role delete guard uses `role: admin` + `admin_role: rid` + `deleted != true` — correct pattern; matches the soft-delete convention used elsewhere.

server.py:287-303 audit_log helper swallows all exceptions with a broad try/except — pragmatic (audit failures must never crash the primary write path) but consider logging to backend logs so silent audit gaps are visible in ops.
server.py:2988-2991 delete-role blocks super_admin — good defense-in-depth on top of the readonly flag returned from GET.

routes/questionnaire.py:488-500 /questionnaire/completion/mine delegates to artist_about() then extracts .completion — pragmatic DRY. Note that a 404 from artist_about (unknown profile) is caught and returns an empty scaffold so new artists get 0/0/[] instead of an error — good UX.

routes/questionnaire.py:410-459 media_matches uses a heuristic token→media.type map. Priya has 0 media-type answers so the array is empty — matches spec. Match iterates one Mongo query per media question; for artists with many media questions this is n round-trips. Consider a single $in query grouped by artist_id + collate types in Python. Minor perf nit for MVP.
AdminAdmins.jsx:341-370 admin-roles-table hides edit/delete buttons when readonly=true — matches the backend's 400 guard. Nice belt-and-braces.
AdminAdmins.jsx:373-400 audit-log-table meta rendering compresses lists to '<n> items' and displays each key-value inline — readable and doesn't blow up long meta blobs. Good UX.

ArtistDashboard.jsx:2029-2078 QuestionnaireNudge uses session-local dismissal via useState — refreshing the page will re-show the banner. This is intentional per the acceptance criteria ('stays gone this session'). If future spec wants persistence, use localStorage.

AdminAdmins.jsx:460 role id is trim().toLowerCase() before POST — matches backend regex `^[a-z0-9_-]+$`. Consider also stripping spaces / rejecting empty strings client-side for friendlier UX (backend does the final validation).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Nudge render/CTA/dismiss, About qa-panel, Admin 3 sub-tabs + role CRUD via modal + audit log all functional)

test_credentials: Super Admin: admin@booktalent.com / Admin@123. Artist: priya@booktalent.com / Artist@123.
seed_data_creation: Tests created ephemeral iter56_marketing_* role + iter56_mkt_* + iter56_susp_* admins. Post-test cleanup via db.users.delete_many + db.admin_roles.delete_many for ^iter56 — 0 leftovers. audit log entries for iter56 test operations remain by design (historical records).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 56 fully green. Regression: /app/backend/tests/test_iter56_roles_audit_nudge.py (run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter56_roles_audit_nudge.py -v`). Key new testids: qn-nudge, qn-nudge-cta, qn-nudge-dismiss (ArtistDashboard Overview); admin-subtab-admins/roles/audit, admin-roles-table, role-row-{id}, edit-role-{id}, delete-role-{id}, new-role-btn, role-modal, role-id-input, role-perm-{permission}, role-submit, audit-log-table, audit-row-{id} (AdminAdmins page); qa-media-chip-{qid} (renders only when media_matches has entries, none for Priya). Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/roles, PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/roles/{rid}, GET /api/admin/audit-log?action=&actor_id=&limit=, GET /api/questionnaire/completion/mine (artist only 403 for others). super_admin role is hard-protected (edit/delete=400). Role delete guarded by users count with admin_role==rid.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — iter 56 acceptance criteria fully met.
